config_template.call: ttnn.add(input_tensor_a, input_tensor_b, memory_config={MEM_CFG}, dtype={DTYPE}, output_tensor={OPTIONAL_INPLACE_TENSOR}, use_legacy={USE_LEGACY})
config_template.broadcast: supports scalar second operand and row/col broadcast of bias-shaped tensors [1,...,1,{DIM}]
config_template.inplace_variant: pass output_tensor=input_tensor_a to fuse residual-add in place (saves L1)

placement_observations.source: qwen decoder layer: out_memcfg = ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG if mode == 'prefill' else ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG (decode-trace replay needs stable DRAM addresses)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: ViT residual [batch, seq~224, hidden=768], block-sharded across 8x8 grid
embedding sum [batch, seq, hidden] (small, fits L1)
placement_observations.source: vit/bert embeddings: ttnn.add(embedding_output, position_embeddings, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG, dtype=ttnn.bfloat8_b)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: attention scores + mask [batch, heads, q_seq, k_seq] (interleaved, can be large)
placement_observations.source: falcon attention test: attn_weights = ttnn.add(attn_weights, attention_mask, memory_config=dram_interleaved_memory_config); sliced variant uses HEIGHT_SHARDED L1 slices with output_tensor=mm_slice in-place

placement_observations.size_descriptor: attention scores + mask slice [num_cores-sharded slice of 71*seq x seq]
placement_observations.source: falcon sliced attention: ttnn.add(mm_slice, attn_mask_slice, memory_config=height_sharded_memory_config, output_dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, output_tensor=mm_slice)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: resnet residual feature map (per-core sharded conv output)
large diffusion feature map [C,H,W] after sharded_to_interleaved
placement_observations.source: SD resnet block: hidden_states = ttnn.add(input_tensor, hidden_states, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) after both inputs converted from sharded to L1 interleaved

placement_observations.size_descriptor: sharded transformer-block residual (inherits producer's shard spec)
placement_observations.source: SD/SDXL transformer block: sum = ttnn.add(attn_output, hidden_states, memory_config=hidden_states.memory_config()); attn_output resharded/to_memory_config'd to match first
mamba residual block: ttnn.add(residual, mamba_block_out, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG, output_tensor=mamba_block_out)
falcon decoder: memory_config=self.model_config['PARALLEL_ATTN_ADD_OUTPUT_MEMCFG'] / ['DROPOUT_ADD_OUTPUT_MEMCFG'] (model-config driven, typically DRAM interleaved)
